meta.title: ICS Security - The European Perspective
meta.description:
Klaus Mochalski came over from Germany and informed the mostly US audience at S4 on what is happening on the continent related to ICS security. One way they differ is more regulation from the EU and the member states (using Germany in this session). "Many companies in critical infrastructure had to do something" because of these regulations. He also believes that "Regulation trumps awareness".

Klaus explains the most important regulation, the IT-SiG, in more detail including showing some of the physical forms that must be completed.

In the second half Klaus goes into practical observations on where European companies are doing well and not so well, and a lot of this sounded familiar to what is happening in the US.
